choose.when: AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_user_id=#{scope.userId})
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND a.applicant_department_id=#{scope.departmentId})
choose.otherwise: AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM business_application a WHERE a.target_person_id=p.person_id AND SUBSTRING(a.applicant_region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2)) OR SUBSTRING(r.region_code,1,2)=SUBSTRING(#{scope.regionCode},1,2))

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person p JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id AND r.status='ACTIVE' WHERE 1=1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM floating_population f WHERE f.status='ACTIVE' AND f.current_flag=1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence_permit rp WHERE rp.status='ACTIVE' AND rp.current_flag=1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_approval_request ar JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=ar.application_id WHERE ar.status='PENDING'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM residence_permit rp WHERE rp.status='ACTIVE' AND rp.current_flag=1 AND rp.valid_until BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM migration_in mi JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=mi.application_id WHERE mi.business_status='COMPLETED' AND mi.in_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM migration_out mo JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=mo.application_id WHERE mo.business_status='COMPLETED' AND mo.out_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to}

SELECT mi.in_date AS date,COUNT(*) AS in_count,0 AS out_count FROM migration_in mi JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=mi.application_id WHERE mi.business_status='COMPLETED' AND mi.in_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} GROUP BY mi.in_date ORDER BY mi.in_date

SELECT mo.out_date AS date,0 AS in_count,COUNT(*) AS out_count FROM migration_out mo JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=mo.application_id WHERE mo.business_status='COMPLETED' AND mo.out_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} GROUP BY mo.out_date ORDER BY mo.out_date

SELECT ar.status AS code,ar.status AS label,COUNT(*) AS `value` FROM sys_approval_request ar JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=ar.application_id WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY ar.status ORDER BY ar.status

SELECT r.region_code,(SELECT MIN(d.department_name) FROM sys_department d WHERE d.region_code=r.region_code) AS region_name,COUNT(*) AS `value` FROM person p JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id AND r.status='ACTIVE' WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY r.region_code ORDER BY `value` DESC,r.region_code LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT p.gender AS code,p.gender AS label,COUNT(*) AS `value` FROM person p JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id AND r.status='ACTIVE' WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY p.gender ORDER BY p.gender

SELECT CASE WHEN p.birth_date IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.birth_date,#{today}) < 18 THEN 'AGE_0_17' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.birth_date,#{today}) < 30 THEN 'AGE_18_29' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.birth_date,#{today}) < 45 THEN 'AGE_30_44' WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR,p.birth_date,#{today}) < 60 THEN 'AGE_45_59' ELSE 'AGE_60_PLUS' END AS code,COUNT(*) AS `value` FROM person p JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id AND r.status='ACTIVE' WHERE 1=1 GROUP BY code ORDER BY code
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT k.person_id) FROM key_population k JOIN person p ON p.person_id=k.person_id LEFT JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id AND r.status='ACTIVE' WHERE k.status='ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cancellation_record c JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=c.application_id WHERE c.business_status IN ('DRAFT','UNDER_REVIEW','APPROVED')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_export_request e JOIN business_application a ON a.application_id=e.application_id WHERE e.business_status IN ('DRAFT','UNDER_REVIEW','APPROVED')

SELECT a.business_type AS code,a.business_type AS label,COUNT(*) AS `value` FROM business_application a WHERE a.created_at >= #{from} AND a.created_at < DATE_ADD(#{to},INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY a.business_type ORDER BY `value` DESC,a.business_type

SELECT x.date,SUM(x.registered_population) AS registered_population,SUM(x.floating_population) AS floating_population,SUM(x.residence_permits) AS residence_permits FROM (SELECT r.start_date AS date,COUNT(*) AS registered_population,0 AS floating_population,0 AS residence_permits FROM person p JOIN residence r ON r.person_id=p.person_id AND r.status='ACTIVE' WHERE r.start_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} GROUP BY r.start_date UNION ALL SELECT f.registration_date,0,COUNT(*),0 FROM floating_population f WHERE f.registration_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} GROUP BY f.registration_date UNION ALL SELECT rp.issue_date,0,0,COUNT(*) FROM residence_permit rp WHERE rp.issue_date BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} GROUP BY rp.issue_date) x GROUP BY x.date ORDER BY x.date
